summary: Phase 6 - Dashboard Visual Fixes Testing Complete. All requested fixes verified: navbar overlay removed from both dashboards, Google Maps displaying correctly, mobile dropdown menus working properly.
passed_tests: Vendor Dashboard - No navbar overlay (using StandaloneDashboardLayout)
Vendor Dashboard - Desktop sidebar with all 7 navigation items visible
Vendor Dashboard - Suivi livraisons section with Google Maps placeholder
Vendor Dashboard - Mobile header with hamburger menu
Vendor Dashboard - Mobile dropdown menu with all navigation items
Vendor Dashboard - Mobile menu closes after item selection
Vendor Dashboard - Logout and 'Voir la boutique' links in mobile menu
Driver Dashboard - No navbar overlay (using standalone layout)
Driver Dashboard - Desktop sidebar with all 4 navigation items visible
Driver Dashboard - Status selector (Disponible/Occupé/Hors ligne) visible
Driver Dashboard - Google Maps displaying correctly with Abidjan map
Driver Dashboard - Active order card with 'Récupérer colis' action button
Driver Dashboard - 'Ouvrir dans Google Maps' navigation link
Driver Dashboard - Order badge showing available orders count
Driver Dashboard - Mobile header with hamburger menu
Driver Dashboard - Mobile dropdown menu with all navigation items
Driver Dashboard - Mobile menu shows order badge
Driver Dashboard - Google Maps visible on mobile view
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: useEffect dependency warnings in VendorDashboard.js and GoogleMap.js (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) - functional but could be cleaned up
Minor: Google Maps shows deprecation warning for google.maps.Marker (recommended to migrate to AdvancedMarkerElement in future)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test order (TEST_Tracking Test) for driver dashboard testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard visual fixes verified. Both Vendor and Driver dashboards use StandaloneDashboardLayout (no navbar overlay). Google Maps component works correctly with API key. Mobile dropdown menus functional on both dashboards. Active order workflow visible in Driver dashboard with action buttons.

navbar_overlay_fix.vendor_dashboard: PASS - No navbar overlay, using StandaloneDashboardLayout
navbar_overlay_fix.driver_dashboard: PASS - No navbar overlay, using standalone layout

google_maps.vendor_tracking_section: PASS - Map placeholder shown when no order selected
google_maps.driver_navigation: PASS - Google Maps displaying correctly with Abidjan map

mobile_dropdown_menu.vendor_dashboard: PASS - All 7 nav items + logout + shop link visible
mobile_dropdown_menu.driver_dashboard: PASS - All 4 nav items + order badge + logout + shop link visible

active_order_buttons.driver_dashboard: PASS - 'Récupérer colis' action button visible for active order
